violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Dish machine was not priming after sanitizer solution was replenished.

POT HAZ RTE FOOD DATING AND DISPOSITION (2 pts): Ready to eat potentially hazardous food in the form of cakes and other ingredients in the walk in cooler was noted not being properly dated for disposition.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor in walk-in cooler and in the walk-in freezer.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. Unable to check sanitizing concentration due to no water exiting spray bar on the sanitizing end of machine. Utilize 3 compartment sink to complete the sanitizing step for all utensils washed in dish machine until the sanitizing function has been restored and verified.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored not covered in food storage and walk in cooler. Observed dry ingredient storage bins in dry food storage area not covered and sauces and food items not covered in walk in cooler.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided for chlorine testing in the dish machine.

PLUMBING SYSTEM (1 pts): Faucet in kitchen handwash sink noted not functioning. Hot water side faucet valve does not close staff are using the hot water shut off valve located on the wall below the sink to make sink operational.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Dry food storage shelves not properly sealed. Shelving is constructed of an absorbent material.
